name: LED Sleek Exit / Egress Light
shortDescription: Slim ceiling-mounted LED exit sign with up to 3-hour battery backup on mains failure.
longDescription: A slim aluminium-profile exit sign fitted with a 3W LED module rated for 15+ years of lamp life at under 5W running cost. Available maintained (always lit), maintained-photoluminescent (lit plus glows if power to the sign itself fails), or without-battery for mains-only installations. Ceiling-touch or surface-mounted, with white ABS housing and a moulded diffuser.

images.alt: LED Sleek Exit / Egress Light supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Housing
specs.value: White ABS, IP-rated, Ni-MH/Ni-Cd rechargeable battery
